description: A colorist needs access to the final edited sequence of a film to begin the color grading process.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the final, picture-locked edit of the film from the asset management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the correct version of the final edit.

nodes.task_description: Generate an Edit Decision List (EDL) from the sequence.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully exports an EDL file.

nodes.task_description: Provide the colorist with the final sequence and the EDL file.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent securely transfers the necessary files to the colorist.
